nodes.label: SUVAT / mechanics helper for the CASIO menu.  The program keeps exact rational/s
Small FIFO-ish cache helper; enough for repeated show/simplify calls.
Simplify sqrt(n) into (coeff, remainder) where sqrt(n) = coeff * sqrt(remainder)
Convert a numeric AST node to float. Returns None if not purely numeric.
Format a float to a clean decimal string.
Estimate significant figures from input text.
Format an equation node into a human-readable string with clear operator precede
Simplify exact mechanics expressions without losing surd form.
Parse scalar mechanics values and formulas, including implicit products.
Detect keyword presets in input text. Returns dict of variable overrides.
Solve for t using the quadratic from s = ut + 1/2at^2.
Solve for v using v^2 = u^2 + 2as.
Work out which SUVAT variable is unknown from blanks or the comma marker.
Return exact working for one requested SUVAT variable.
Print formula, substitution, exact answer, then optional units/decimal.
Interactive CLI flow used by both desktop tests and calculator runs.
